title: Pic Repost Commands
description: Adds /pic and /post commands that re-upload attached images with attribution and a comments thread.

fields.label: Delete reaction emoji
fields.help: Emoji the post author can react with to delete their repost. Unicode (🗑️) or custom (<:name:id>).

fields.label: Last mention is delete author
fields.help: When on (default), delete-by-reaction uses the last user mention in the caption — put {mention} after {message} so mentions inside the caption text are not treated as the author. When off, the first mention is used instead.

fields.label: Disabled reply
fields.help: Shown when someone uses /pic or /post while this module is turned off.

fields.label: No images attached
fields.help: Shown when the user runs the command without attaching an image.

fields.label: Non-image attachments
fields.help: Shown when attachments are not images. Tokens: {names}

fields.label: Attachment too large
fields.help: Shown when an image exceeds this server's upload limit (set by boost level). Tokens: {names}, {limit}

fields.label: Message too long
fields.help: Shown when the caption exceeds Discord's 2000 character limit.

fields.label: Download failed
fields.help: Shown when an attached image could not be downloaded.

fields.label: Cannot post
fields.help: Shown when the bot cannot post in the channel.

fields.label: Post failed
fields.help: Shown when posting the images to the channel fails (size/permission issues).

fields.label: Attribution caption
fields.help: Caption posted with the re-uploaded images. Tokens: {message}, {mention}, {deleteEmoji}. Place {mention} after {message} so delete-by-reaction identifies the post author correctly.

fields.label: Success reply
fields.help: Confirmation shown to the author. Tokens: {count}, {images}

fields.label: Thread failure note
fields.help: Appended to the success reply when the comments thread could not be created.

fields.label: Thread opener
fields.help: First message posted in the comments thread.
